warnings: The fermion backend entry compresses two degenerate Majorana Weyl mass eigenstates into one dof=4 species.
Explicit thermal masses are placeholders and are not direct inputs to semianalytic_pipeline.py.
Literature benchmark mappings are approximate scan seeds, not exact model reproductions.
approximations: Higgs portal coupling fixed to zero.
Hypercharge-dark kinetic mixing fixed to zero.

gauge_groups.name: SU(3)_c
gauge_groups.notes: All new dark-sector fields are singlets.

gauge_groups.name: SU(2)_L
gauge_groups.notes: All new dark-sector fields are singlets.

gauge_groups.name: U(1)_Y
gauge_groups.notes: All new dark-sector fields have zero hypercharge.

gauge_groups.name: U(1)_D
gauge_groups.notes: Broken completely by the Coleman-Weinberg vev of Phi.

global_symmetries.name: classical_scale_invariance
global_symmetries.notes: Forbids explicit scalar mass terms and dimensionful fermion mass terms before dimensional transmutation.

global_symmetries.name: accidental_dark_fermion_number_or_residual_parity
global_symmetries.notes: Not required by the FOPT backend; a dark matter interpretation needs later stability checks.

particle_content.name: Phi
particle_content.role: Coleman-Weinberg dark scalar and FOPT order parameter.

particle_content.name: X_mu
particle_content.role: Massive dark photon after U(1)_D breaking.

particle_content.name: psi_plus
particle_content.role: Positive-charge Weyl component; one degenerate Majorana mass eigenstate after symmetry breaking.

particle_content.name: psi_minus
particle_content.role: Negative-charge Weyl component; one degenerate Majorana mass eigenstate after symmetry breaking.

lagrangian_terms.name: dark_scalar_kinetic
lagrangian_terms.notes: D_mu Phi = (partial_mu - I*2*g_D*X_mu) Phi for q_Phi=2.

lagrangian_terms.name: dark_fermion_kinetic
lagrangian_terms.notes: Covariant derivatives use q_psi_plus=1 and q_psi_minus=-1.

lagrangian_terms.name: dark_yukawa
lagrangian_terms.notes: Gauge invariant: -2+1+1=0 and 2-1-1=0. Produces two degenerate Majorana Weyl masses after Phi obtains a vev.

lagrangian_terms.name: classically_scale_invariant_potential
lagrangian_terms.notes: No explicit mass term; lambda_D is Coleman-Weinberg dependent.

lagrangian_terms.name: higgs_portal_fixed_zero
lagrangian_terms.notes: Allowed by symmetries but fixed to lambda_HP=0 for backend scans.

lagrangian_terms.name: kinetic_mixing_fixed_zero
lagrangian_terms.notes: Allowed for two U(1) gauge groups but fixed to epsilon=0 for backend scans.

free_parameters.name: y_D
free_parameters.range: nonnegative perturbative real coupling with beta_lambda > 0

gf_psi.description: Mass-over-vev ratio for each degenerate Majorana Weyl mass eigenstate.

beta_lambda.description: Coleman-Weinberg beta coefficient in the backend mass-over-vev basis.

m_chi_squared.description: CW pseudo-dilaton radial scalar mass squared.

lambda_D.determination: Coleman-Weinberg minimization condition; not scanned independently.

epsilon.description: Hypercharge-dark kinetic mixing fixed to zero.

assumptions: The dark sector is decoupled from the Standard Model for the FOPT backend scan.
The model is classically scale invariant at tree level.
The FOPT is controlled by the single radial background chi.
The Coleman-Weinberg quartic is dependent and not a scan parameter.
Downstream scans enforce beta_lambda > 0 and perturbative g_D and y_D.
The two Weyl fermions are degenerate in mass and are compressed into one backend fermion species with total dof=4.

backend_compatibility.notes: Compatible with the conformal single-field semianalytic backend when beta_lambda>0 is enforced. Explicit thermal-mass placeholders are not direct backend inputs.

ssb_pattern.notes: The dark photon becomes massive and the scalar angular mode is eaten.

vev_convention.notes: Unitary gauge is implied; backend mass convention is m_i(chi)=g_i*chi.

tree_level_potential.name: conformal_quartic
tree_level_potential.notes: lambda_D is dependent through Coleman-Weinberg minimization; no chi**2 mass term is present.

field_dependent_masses.notes: Represents two degenerate Majorana Weyl mass eigenstates from psi_plus and psi_minus.
CW pseudo-dilaton mass at the broken minimum; not double-counted as an independent backend driver.

thermal_masses.notes: Analytic placeholder only; semianalytic_pipeline.py constructs thermal coefficients internally.
Analytic placeholder only; not a direct backend input.

expression_symbols.meaning: Real radial dark scalar background field
CW beta coefficient for the quartic
